summary: Output formatting module - JSON response envelopes with compact mode support

findings.summary: Output formatting module - JSON response envelopes with compact mode support
notes: Three envelope types: success (ok:true), failure (ok:false, status:'error'), partial (ok:false, status:'partial')
Standard envelope fields: ok, schemaVersion:1, command, status, projectRoot, configPath, data, next, error, code, message, details

Compact mode (--compact flag) strips undefined fields, abbreviates primary objects (project->alias/name, process->key fields), truncates text >1200 chars, and drops sensitive paths (command, cwd, env, log, path fields)
Section keys define array fields that get compacted differently based on their type (processes, ports, projects, tasks, checks, events, conflicts, listeners, results, targets, removed)
Default next actions for confirmation_required errors guide users to --safe or --help
